caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing racks. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. To his left, a white mannequin wears a white shirt. In the early part of the scene, the man drinks from a red plastic cup. As the sequence progresses, he lowers the cup and looks toward something off-screen with a neutral expression. Two logos are visible at the bottom of the screen: one on the left featuring a stylized "P" and "TIE" and another on the right that says "RED VELVET". The background remains static while the man moves his arm and head, transitioning from drinking to looking forward.
